tags.tag_description: A calendar date or time expression (e.g., 'August 13, 2019').
A happening or occurrence (e.g., conferences, festivals, incidents).
A place or geographic location (city, landmark, address).
A company, institution, agency, or group.
A named commercial item or specific product.
A class or category of products (e.g., 'IPA', 'smartphone').
A named travel path or route (road, trail, transit line).
